name: Chicken Breasts with Feta Cheese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Plus 1 ts all purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray, place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add chicken and cook for 7 minutes on each side until cooked through. Set aside and keep warm.
3. Melt margarine in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add flour and stir constantly with a wire whisk.
4. Gradually add milk while stirring constantly. Stir in chives.
5. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook, stirring constantly for 3 minutes or until thickened and bubbly.
6. Add cheese and stir until the cheese melts.
7. Spoon the sauce over chicken.
